authority.supersession: The V1 and V2 Stage 21 packets remain immutable provenance but are non-authorizing. V3 must preserve their Sobol points, family axes, attempt/control budgets, folds, costs, funding, and historical multiplicity except where this contract explicitly closes semantics.

control_determinism.A2_context_permutation: within symbol x UTC-month x lagged-liquidity-decile, sort parent IDs and permute the complete ordered component vector without replacement; group size<2=>unavailable_control
control_determinism.A3_retest_time_permutation: within symbol x UTC-quarter x side, encode each parent as integer add lag in 5-minute bars or NO_ADD; sort parent IDs and permute without replacement. Numeric assigned lag creates a synthetic add at first authorized open after starter_entry+lag*5m if starter is still open and within the registered window; it does not require the true reclaim predicate. Otherwise unavailable_control
control_determinism.A4_sign_permutation: within symbol x UTC-year, sort decisions; permute complete scalar signs including zeros without replacement; preserve magnitude, exposure, context, entry and exit
control_determinism.duplicate: economically identical transformed controls are unavailable_duplicate_address
control_determinism.hash_seed: first unsigned big-endian 64 bits of SHA256(canonical tuple)

matched_pseudo_event_allocator.A1: pseudo decision uses the same trailing impulse/base clocks and frozen structure, but is selected from timestamps failing at least one primary A1 signal gate; apply the same side, entry and exit grammar
matched_pseudo_event_allocator.A3: pseudo candidate is a same-side first-close prior-level crossing using the same lookback that fails at least one breakout-rank or confirmation gate; apply the same starter/add/exit grammar
matched_pseudo_event_allocator.KDA02B: match side, month, 2-hour slot, liquidity decile, 20-day volatility decile and exact price-move-magnitude decile while excluding the derivatives-state predicate
matched_pseudo_event_allocator.pool: same symbol, side, UTC month, 2-hour UTC slot, lagged-liquidity decile and 20-day realized-volatility decile; PIT/lifecycle/data/execution valid; not a true parent event; no overlap within the parent's maximum registered holding window with a true or already allocated pseudo event
matched_pseudo_event_allocator.selection: candidate with minimum SHA256(seed,control_id,parent_event_id,candidate_ts); allocation without replacement in lexical parent order

controls_forensics_and_routes.claim_caps: all routes are program_exposed_historical; forensic tags limit claim scope and do not become independent validation or deployment
controls_forensics_and_routes.component_ablation_pass: parent primary-control primary>0 and parent stress>=control stress-5bps
controls_forensics_and_routes.family_outer_vector: eight family-fold values, each the median of that fold's selected beam candidate metrics; a fold with no selected candidate is -inf

forensic_tags.concentrated: max symbol/day/year concentration>0.50 or worst leave-one-symbol/month net<=0
forensic_tags.funding_sensitive: funding-zero or one boundary alignment changes the sign of base net
forensic_tags.parameter_sensitive: fewer than 60% of available registered one-axis refinement neighbors have positive base net
forensic_tags.sample_limited: fewer than 5 nonempty outer folds or fewer than 30 events in any reported survivor ledger

controls_forensics_and_routes.main_null_pass: mean paired uplift>0 and bootstrap_q05>0 with control coverage>=0.70
controls_forensics_and_routes.paired_control_metric: parent minus assigned control net contribution by parent assignment; aggregate to parent UTC-day means; report mean and 5000-replicate day-cluster bootstrap Type-7 q05

routes.A1_COMPRESSION_V2: control_supported_rolling_candidate when common gate and matched-pseudo main null pass and complete signal beats price-only impulse; execution/sample-limited routes as above; otherwise translation_rejected
routes.A2_PRIOR_HIGH_RS_CONTEXT_V1: context_uplift_candidate only when common gate, context-permuted main null, and parent-only paired uplift pass; sample_limited_context_candidate when positive with insufficient coverage; otherwise overlay_rejected
routes.A3_STARTER_RETEST_V3: starter_plus_add_candidate when common gate, retest-time main null, and starter-only paired uplift pass for add_fraction>0; starter_only_candidate when common gate passes for add_fraction=0 or the starter passes while add does not; execution/sample-limited routes as applicable; otherwise translation_rejected
routes.A4_TSMOM_V7: control_supported_rolling_candidate when common gate passes, sign-permuted main null passes, and generic signed-return uplift is positive; execution_sensitive_candidate when base gate passes but stress/delay fails; sample_limited_candidate when positive but fold/control coverage is insufficient; otherwise translation_rejected
routes.KDA02B_SURVIVOR_ADJUDICATION_V1: component_supported_survivor only when identity base>0, identity-price_only paired uplift q05>0, identity-OI_removed uplift q05>0, identity-generic_structure uplift q05>0, 32bps stress>0, and 15-minute delay base>0. Base positive but stress/delay failure=>execution_sensitive_candidate. Base positive but controls/coverage weak=>sample_limited_candidate. Otherwise survivor_rejected

A2.application: A2 multiplies every exposure of its exact bound A1/A3 parent. The multiplier is frozen at the parent decision and applies equally to gross return, costs, funding, gap allowance, occupancy, and all parent legs
A2.linear_size_0_to_1: product over enabled components of clip(2*p-1,0,1); no enabled components gives 1
A2.no_double_count: A2 reports contextual uplift against the same bound parent and never adds a second trade ledger
A2.permission: 1 when every enabled component percentile>=0.50, otherwise 0
A2.tercile_size: use min enabled component: <1/3=>0, [1/3,2/3)=>0.5, >=2/3=>1; no enabled components gives 1

A3.add_exposure: add_fraction*parent_context_multiplier when a valid add exists, else 0
A3.leg_exit: starter and add are separately attributed legs and each applies the registered exit module from its own fill. The parent remains occupied until max(starter_exit_ts,add_exit_ts); a missing add does not reject the starter
A3.parent_value: sum of starter and add weighted gross/cost/funding/net contributions
A3.unused_notional: cash with zero return; never redistributed

economic_accounting.per_leg_cost: exposure*round_trip_cost_bps, exactly once for each completed leg
economic_accounting.per_leg_exposure: nonnegative frozen notional fraction at leg entry. It remains fixed until that leg exits and is not renormalized after other symbols or legs become unavailable
economic_accounting.per_leg_funding: exposure*(adverse_exact_funding_bps+registered_gap_allowance_bps) over the leg's actual entry-to-exit interval; favourable funding cannot rescue, activate, rank, or select

episode_state_machine.base: next exact registered base_duration contiguous completed bars

confirmation.close_plus_bounded_15m_delay: first post-base close is beyond the extreme and the completed close exactly 15 minutes later remains beyond it
confirmation.one_close: first post-base completed close strictly beyond frozen impulse extreme
confirmation.two_closes: first two post-base completed closes both strictly beyond frozen impulse extreme

episode_state_machine.confirmation_failure: reject; do not wait for a later breakout from the same impulse/base
episode_state_machine.contraction: sample_sd(base adjacent 5m log returns)/sample_sd(immediately preceding equal-duration adjacent returns)
episode_state_machine.early_breakout: before the base completes, any close beyond the frozen impulse extreme in signal direction rejects breakout_before_confirmation
episode_state_machine.entry: next authorized 5-minute open after final confirmation close

impulse_extreme.long: maximum completed 5-minute close in the impulse window
impulse_extreme.short: minimum completed 5-minute close in the impulse window

episode_state_machine.rearm: after accepted or rejected episode, same side remains disarmed until its impulse percentile is strictly below q50. In symmetric mode the opposite side is also blocked until the owning side rearms
episode_state_machine.start: first eligible timestamp whose side-specific impulse percentile is >= impulse_rank_min and immediately previous eligible timestamp was below it
episode_state_machine.symmetric_side: evaluate both sides; select greater percentile excess over its threshold. Exact tie is ambiguous_side and no episode starts

exit_modules.ATR_stop_1.5: initial adverse ATR20*1.5 close trigger, hard 10-day cap
exit_modules.ATR_stop_2.5: initial adverse ATR20*2.5 close trigger, hard 10-day cap
exit_modules.ATR_trail_2: trail 2*ATR20 from best completed close, hard 10-day cap
exit_modules.ATR_trail_3: trail 3*ATR20 from best completed close, hard 10-day cap

A1_COMPRESSION_V2.fixed_target: valid only with ATR_stop exit; target distance=fixed_target_R*initial ATR stop distance; completed-close trigger, next-open fill

prior_high_RS_context.RS: symbol 20-day log return minus BTC 20-day log return; multiply by side
prior_high_RS_context.pass: symbol-local side-specific proximity training percentile>=0.50 and same-timestamp PIT RS rank>=0.50
prior_high_RS_context.prior_level_lookback: 60 completed UTC daily bars, excluding decision day

structural_exit.base_failure_long: first completed close strictly below minimum completed close in the frozen base
structural_exit.base_failure_short: first completed close strictly above maximum completed close in the frozen base

BTC_ETH.aggregation: compute BTC and ETH separately, then arithmetic mean
BTC_ETH.drawdown: 60d drawdown-magnitude percentile; long uses 1-p, short uses p
BTC_ETH.trend: mean of 20d and 60d time-series trend percentiles per asset; long uses p, short uses 1-p

A2_PRIOR_HIGH_RS_CONTEXT_V1.RS: side*(symbol log return-BTC log return) over registered RS_lookback_days, average-rank cross-sectionally at decision

breadth_dispersion_component.both: arithmetic mean of enabled breadth and dispersion components
breadth_dispersion_component.breadth_long: time-series percentile of raw PIT breadth
breadth_dispersion_component.dispersion: 1-time-series percentile of raw PIT dispersion for both sides

A2_PRIOR_HIGH_RS_CONTEXT_V1.parent_binding: exact registry parent_binding; parent family/address cannot be replaced after outcomes

prior_level.first_close_above_long: decision close>prior_high and immediately prior completed close<=prior_high
prior_level.first_close_above_short_mirror: decision close<prior_low and immediately prior completed close>=prior_low
prior_level.long: previous completed-daily high over registered prior_high_lookback_days excluding decision day
prior_level.short: previous completed-daily low over the same lookback

breakout_failure_exit.long: first completed close strictly below frozen L
breakout_failure_exit.short: first completed close strictly above frozen L

A3_STARTER_RETEST_V3.breakout_level_freeze: At the first qualifying crossing close, freeze L as the previous maximum completed UTC daily high for long or previous minimum completed daily low for short over breakout_lookback_days, excluding decision day. Confirmation variants use this same L

confirmation.close_plus_15m_delay: initial crossing and completed close exactly 15 minutes later remain beyond L
confirmation.two_closes: initial crossing and immediately next completed close both remain beyond L

A3_STARTER_RETEST_V3.exit_modules: apply the registered time, ATR stop/trail, fixed-target, or breakout_failure module independently from each leg fill; simultaneous triggers use stop/structure, trail, target, signal reversal, then time priority

retest.long_activation: first completed close entering [L-D*ATR20,L+D*ATR20] from above, with prior close above upper band and activation close<prior close
retest.long_invalidation: completed close strictly below lower band before reclaim
retest.long_reclaim: first later close >L, >activation close, and >immediately previous close
retest.short_activation: first completed close entering the band from below, with prior close below lower band and activation close>prior close
retest.short_invalidation: completed close strictly above upper band before reclaim
retest.short_reclaim: first later close <L, <activation close, and <immediately previous close
retest.unavailable_add: add entry after retest window, after starter exit, or with invalidation/no reclaim gives zero add exposure and preserves starter

A3_STARTER_RETEST_V3.retest_window: half-open interval [starter_entry_ts, starter_entry_ts+registered_retest_window); search only while starter remains open
A3_STARTER_RETEST_V3.side: generate mirrored long prior-high and short prior-low breakouts. If both qualify at the same timestamp reject ambiguous_side
A3_STARTER_RETEST_V3.starter_entry: next authorized 5-minute open after final confirmation close

A4_TSMOM_V7.definition_symbol_nonoverlap: new opportunity only when flat; actual exit blocks intervening opportunities

direction.long_short: long for scalar>0, short for scalar<0, flat at zero

A4_TSMOM_V7.signal_reversal: at registered rebalance strict sign change, next authorized open
A4_TSMOM_V7.time_and_ATR_exits: as already registered, with completed-close triggers, next-open fills, and hard 10-day cap on ATR/trail

general_resolution_rules.bar_timeframe: native completed UTC 5-minute Kraken trade bars unless a daily calculation is explicitly named
general_resolution_rules.decision_information: only fields with source_close_ts<=decision_ts and feature_available_ts<=decision_ts
general_resolution_rules.edge_case_policy: rare runtime/data edge cases not changing a registered economic meaning fail the affected observation/address closed with a reason. They do not stop unrelated families. Unrecognized registered field values or common accounting divergence stop globally.
general_resolution_rules.execution: entry or exit is the first authorized trade open at or after the trigger-completion timestamp; maximum lookup delay is 10 minutes; missing open, lifecycle invalidity, or fold crossing rejects locally
general_resolution_rules.missingness: a missing or invalid observation makes only that symbol-side-event/address observation unavailable unless a common authority, accounting, or implementation defect affects the campaign
general_resolution_rules.strict_trigger: all price triggers use completed trade closes; equality does not trigger unless a threshold rule explicitly says equality passes
general_resolution_rules.tie_break: numeric score ties use the lexically smaller canonical economic address; event-side ties are rejected as ambiguous_side; timestamp ties use the earlier timestamp; group-key ties use lexical key

ATR20.initialization: arithmetic mean of first 20 consecutive valid true ranges
ATR20.missing_day: reset continuity; ATR unavailable until 20 new consecutive valid true ranges
ATR20.source: completed UTC daily trade OHLC; use canonical daily bars when available, else aggregate authorized 5-minute bars
ATR20.valid_day: finite OHLC and close, first/last expected UTC-day bar present, at least 274 of 288 five-minute bars, and no missing run longer than 15 minutes

PIT_membership.known_member: potential member with valid contiguous 20-day daily return
PIT_membership.liquidity_rank: average-rank ties by one-day-lagged 30-day median quote-notional; select registered top N
PIT_membership.potential_member: instrument exists in the machine-authorized current-roster bar-existence cohort at timestamp, is not known suspended/wound down/settled, has listing age>=30 calendar days, and has a finite one-day-lagged 30-day median canonical quote-notional

market_features.breadth: known members with 20-day log return>0 divided by known_count
market_features.breadth_dispersion_rank: raw market-level breadth and dispersion are each fit to a fold-local time-series empirical distribution over eligible decision timestamps; they are not cross-sectionally ranked
market_features.dispersion: median absolute deviation from the cross-sectional median of known-member 20-day log returns

realized_volatility.returns: log close-to-close returns only for adjacent expected 5-minute timestamps; never bridge a gap
realized_volatility.zero_variance: valid zero unless used as divisor, where the address observation is unavailable

metric_denominators.bootstrap: IID resample complete nonempty UTC-day means with replacement, same length, 5000 PCG64 replicates using frozen hash seed; Type-7 q05
metric_denominators.concentration: max absolute grouped sum/sum absolute event contributions; zero denominator=>unavailable
metric_denominators.day_metric: arithmetic mean of event/parent/cohort net contributions entering that UTC day
metric_denominators.eligible_calendar_days: number of UTC dates intersecting the fold interval
metric_denominators.event_count: accepted actual-exit-nonoverlapping parent events; A3 parent counts once regardless of add
metric_denominators.family_fold_summary: median of the selected beam candidates' outer metrics; no best-candidate substitution
metric_denominators.inner_fold_vector: fixed complete registered vector; empty/unavailable values are negative infinity and never omitted
metric_denominators.market_days: unique UTC parent-entry dates with at least one accepted event/cohort
metric_denominators.occupancy: sum of actual leg exposure*holding_seconds divided by sum over every completed 5-minute timestamp of PIT-eligible-member-count*300
metric_denominators.primary: arithmetic mean of nonempty UTC-day metrics
metric_denominators.stress: same with stress costs and gap allowance
metric_denominators.type7_with_negative_infinity: sort including -inf; h=(n-1)q, j=floor(h), g=h-j. If g=0 return x[j]. If either positively weighted endpoint is -inf return -inf; otherwise linear interpolation

preoutcome_completeness_gate.local_failure_scope: a rare data observation edge case covered by this contract is marked unavailable locally; only an unmapped registered semantic or common accounting contradiction blocks launch
requirements: emit SEMANTIC_COVERAGE_MATRIX.json mapping every distinct family/config field and value to interpreter function, formula, missingness, and tests
emit CONTROL_COVERAGE_MATRIX.json mapping all 20 control definitions to deterministic transformer/allocator and tests
emit EXIT_ACCOUNTING_MATRIX.json covering every family, exit, target, side, leg, cost, funding, and simultaneous-trigger path
emit SELECTION_ROUTE_MATRIX.json covering plateau, medoid, overlap, refinement, beam, control pass, forensic tag, and route branch
focused synthetic micro-ledgers exercise every distinct registered value and every route branch
no unknown/unmapped value, default branch, TODO, placeholder, or reviewer-invented semantic remains
independent reviewer verifies matrices against all 3521+800 registry rows before any outcome reader opens

runtime.disk_reserve: max(8 GiB,10% filesystem capacity); compact/deduplicate/hash-archive before reserve
runtime.epochs: renewable 24-hour checkpoints continuing automatically under the same approval
runtime.memory_ceiling: 75% of physical RAM for complete process tree
runtime.runtime_repairs: narrow outcome-blind mechanical repairs may be tested, independently reviewed, committed and resumed without new approval when economic/data/selection semantics and authority hashes remain unchanged

stall_detection.action: restart supervisor once from last atomic generation
stall_detection.after_maximum: global resumable bound stop with Telegram alert
stall_detection.condition: no new committed marker and no state-generation advance for 120 minutes while unfinished work exists

runtime.supervisor: persistent detached remote process, independent of chat/browser/local computer
runtime.worker_death: requeue uncommitted job under retry policy; committed valid marker is reused

worker_retry.job_specific_exhaustion: family stop with exact reason; unrelated families continue

runtime.workers: maximum independently benchmarked safe count<=logical CPU count; current target 4

selection_and_refinement.distance: existing equal-axis-weight Gower distance over every family axis, including explicit none levels
selection_and_refinement.event_overlap_deduplication: after final stable regions, candidates are ordered by the frozen beam order; reject a later candidate when Jaccard overlap of development accepted economic-event IDs with an earlier candidate exceeds 0.80
selection_and_refinement.medoid: member minimizing sum of Gower distances to all members; tie by canonical address
selection_and_refinement.neighborhood: for each node c, all nodes with Gower distance<=0.15 from c, including c

refinement.allocation: take first unused reserved IDs up to the family reserve; remaining reserve IDs unavailable_no_plateau
refinement.deduplication: remove existing canonical addresses and duplicates
refinement.final_plateau: recompute the same stable-neighborhood algorithm over screening, anchors and executed refinements
refinement.neighbors: generate every valid one-axis +/- one listed-level neighbor and every valid mechanism-card-listed pairwise combination of such adjacent moves; no three-way moves
refinement.registration: atomically hash-register all selected refinement configs before opening any refinement outcome

selection_and_refinement.region_overlap: sort stable neighborhoods by support descending then medoid address. Greedily retain a region only when its member-set Jaccard overlap with every retained region is <0.50
selection_and_refinement.screening_nodes: all integrity-valid screening and anchor/ablation addresses in the family/fold

threshold_contract.audit: persist counts by feature, address, fold, symbol, side and month; denominator, numerator, exclusions, unique values, thresholds, and hashes

coverage_gate.denominator: all symbol-side decision observations passing PIT, lifecycle, listing age, base data, and required raw-history prerequisites before applying a fitted threshold
coverage_gate.numerator: denominator observations with valid threshold estimate and finite evaluation feature

populations.A1_base_features: one observation per eligible symbol at every completed 5-minute boundary treated as hypothetical end of the registered base, using trailing base and immediately preceding equal-duration window; not only successful episodes
populations.A1_impulse: one observation per eligible symbol-side at every completed 5-minute boundary with complete impulse window
populations.A2_market: one observation per eligible completed 5-minute timestamp, independent of parent events or returns
populations.A3_breakout: one observation per eligible first completed-close prior-level crossing by symbol-side before confirmation/retest/outcome
populations.A4: one observation per eligible symbol at every registered rebalance with complete address-specific history
populations.funding: one observation per eligible symbol-side timestamp using only published/paid funding available by that timestamp

quantile.equality: threshold equality passes the registered >= or <= gate
